payload.answer: Key eval accounting fields: token counts (usage units consumed), provider IDs (data source), model IDs (which model/version processed), estimated price (cost projection), and latency metrics (p50, p90, p95) to reflect typical tail latency. Use clear unit conventions and timestamped snapshots; preserve ambiguity about naming and measurement window where applicable.
payload.decision: provide a concise, structured explanation of required evaluation accounting fields for Brain memory system, preserving ambiguity where applicable.

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguity exists around exact field names and measurement epochs; fields are standard but can be renamed in later iterations.

memory_cards.statement: Required eval accounting fields include token counts (usage units), provider/model IDs (source of tokens), estimated price (cost projection), and latency metrics (p50, p90, p95) to quantify performance.

details: Accounting fields defined and linked to latency metrics.

repair_options: Add schema fields for timestamp, currency, and measurement window to reduce ambiguity.
Define explicit units for token counts and latency (e.g., tokens, milliseconds).
Include per-request vs per-batch aggregation guidelines.
